note: I0 contract-inventory for Curve Ethereum mainnet pre-sign surface (round scope = StableSwap-NG/CryptoSwap-NG DEX + crvUSD lending + veCRV/gauge staking). COVER = the 22 user-facing contracts onboarded this round (factory-deployed StableSwap-NG/CryptoSwap-NG pools called directly, crvUSD Controllers, veCRV/Minter/GaugeController DAO singletons, individual LiquidityGauges). EXCLUDE = peripheral/deferred contracts, each with a reason. Pool/controller/gauge addresses mirror the gate-verified surface/curve/*.coverage.json; DAO singletons + peripherals Etherscan-verified by ContractName. DEFERRED product families (surfaced by a gemini/codex LLM discovery cross-check per onboarding §3.1, but OUT of this round's scope — separate future rounds, addresses NOT yet 1st-party-verified so intentionally not asserted here): scrvUSD savings vault (ERC-4626, ContractName 'Yearn V3 Vault'), LlamaLend one-way lending vaults/controllers, legacy StableSwap-v1 & CryptoSwap-v2 (non-NG) pools, veBoost boost-delegation, Aragon DAO voting, VestingEscrow CRV claims, metapool deposit zaps. Internal LLAMMA AMMs (reached via Controller) and keeper-only PegKeepers remain out of the pre-sign value surface. NB: the LLM cross-check's addresses were largely hallucinated (it returned the CRV-token address for Tricrypto2, and wrong scrvUSD/veBoost addresses) — used only as a category-discovery lens, every candidate disposed against Etherscan.

contracts.name: Tricrypto-NG crvUSD/tBTC/WETH (Base)
contracts.reason: deferred: ~$574K Base tricrypto — ABI not 1st-party verifiable (Etherscan v2 gated for chain 8453 on this key tier, not on Sourcify). CurveV2 venue + coins (crvUSD/tBTC/WETH) already in tokens/8453; onboard once a 1st-party Base ABI source is available.
